a:r.a:t: Size of bubble represents median of base and stretch case upside

This page reflects the potential annual EBITDA or cash impact of the value creation opportunities. It does not provide any indication of the NPV impact on the Enterprise Value of the Target. The alternative slide on the following page provides the NPV impact.
Note: Further analysis is required to prioritize for implementation by entity.

Further required analysis to identify potential benefit include e.g., customer retention, insourcing vs. outsourcing optimization, skilled labor transferability, sales force effectiveness, procurement optimization.
